title: myricaria dahurica subsp. squamosa
intro: Myricaria dahurica subsp. squamosa, also known as the square-leaved Myricaria or squamose Myricaria, is a plant species belonging to the family Tamaricaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Myricaria dahurica subsp. squamosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
